# Node Migration Fixtures

These fixtures support `docs/npm-cli/node-first-migration-sop.md` Phase 0.

Derived from:

- `src/vpn_automation/cli.py`
- `src/vpn_automation/backend.py`
- `src/vpn_automation/jobs.py`
- `src/vpn_automation/pipeline/extract.py`
- `src/vpn_automation/pipeline/speedtest.py`
- `src/vpn_automation/pipeline/availability.py`
- `tests/backend/test_headless_cli.py`
- `tests/backend/test_jobs_cli.py`
- `tests/pipeline/test_extract.py`

The fixtures are intentionally redacted and deterministic. They are contract examples, not live pipeline captures.
